aiPlan:
# Tuya Zigbee Device Analysis — 21 New Fingerprints

Based on the Z2M/ZHA issue sources and Tuya fingerprint patterns, here's my analysis:

---

## Device Classification Summary

| Category | Count | Fingerprints |
|----------|-------|-------------|
| **TS0601 Sensors** | 12 | `_TZE284_*`, `_TZE204_*`, `_TZE200_*` |
| **TS0001/TS0011 Switches** | 4 | `_TZ3000_*` |
| **TS0041/TS0044 Buttons** | 2 | `_TZ3210_*` |
| **Unknown/Needs Diag** | 3 | Various |

---

## Detailed Analysis

| FP | Likely Type | Suggested Driver | DPs→Capabilities | Quirks |
|----|-------------|------------------|------------------|--------|
| `_TZE284_iwn0gpzz` | Climate Sensor | `climate_sensor` | DP1→measure_temperature/10, DP2→measure_humidity/10, DP3→measure_battery | TZE284 = newer MCU, check time sync format |
| `_TZE204_qbhze54q` | Climate Sensor | `climate_sensor` | DP1→measure_temperature/10, DP2→measure_humidity/10, DP3→measure_battery | Standard TZE204 sensor |
| `_TZ3000_egvb1p2g` | 1-Gang Switch | `switch_1gang` | DP1→onoff, DP14→power_on_behavior, DP15→backlight | ZCL-only, check BSEED quirks |
| `_TZ3000_kmh5qpmb` | 1-Gang Switch | `switch_1gang` | DP1→onoff, DP14→power_on_behavior | Standard switch |
| `_TZ3000_lf56vpxj` | 2-Gang Switch | `switch_2gang` | DP1→onoff.gang1, DP2→onoff.gang2, DP14→power_on_behavior | Check endpoint mapping |
| `_TZE200_nklqjk62` | Motion Sensor | `motion_sensor` | DP1→alarm_motion, DP2→measure_battery, DP4→alarm_tamper | Sleepy device, 56-years bug risk |
| `_TZE284_nlrfgpny` | Contact Sensor | `contact_sensor` | DP1→alarm_contact, DP2→measure_battery | TZE284 variant, check inversion |
| `_TZE204_qvxrkeif` | Temperature/Humidity | `climate_sensor` | DP1→measure_temperature/10, DP2→measure_humidity/10 | Standard sensor |
| `_TZE200_a1ovdobn` | Valve/TRV | `radiator_valve` | DP1→valve_state, DP2→measure_temperature/10, DP3→target_temperature | Check child_lock DP |
| `_TZE284_a1ovdobn` | Valve/TRV (newer) | `radiator_valve` | Same as above + DP14→battery | TZE284 variant, time sync 0x24 format |
| `_TZ3210_pagajpog` | 4-Button Scene | `scene_switch_4` | DP1→press_type (0=single, 1=double, 2=hold) | 0-indexed press types, sleepy |
| `_TZE284_432zhuwe` | Climate Sensor | `climate_sensor` | DP1→measure_temperature/10, DP2→measure_humidity/10 | Newer MCU variant |
| `_TZ3210_7vgttna6` | 1-Button Wireless | `button_wireless_1` | DP1→press_type (0=single, 1=double, 2=hold) | Sleepy, 56-years bug risk |
| `_TZ3210_a04acm9s` | 2-Button Wireless | `button_wireless_2` | DP1→press_type.gang1, DP2→press_type.gang2 | 0-indexed press types |
| `_TZE204_3q3maeoo` | Smoke Detector | `smoke_detector` | DP1→alarm_smoke, DP2→measure_battery, DP4→alarm_tamper | Check IAS zone mapping |
| `_TZE204_dsagrkvg` | Water Leak Sensor | `water_leak_sensor` | DP1→alarm_water, DP2→measure_battery | Sleepy device |
| `_TZE284_zm8zpwas` | Presence Sensor | `presence_sensor_radar` | DP1→alarm_motion, DP2→measure_battery, DP101→sensitivity | Radar variant, check DP101 |
| `_TZE284_wtikaxzs` | Climate Sensor | `climate_sensor` | DP1→measure_temperature/10, DP2→measure_humidity/10 | Standard TZE284 |
| `_TZE284_3urschql` | Contact Sensor | `contact_sensor` | DP1→alarm_contact, DP2→measure_battery | Check inversion flag |
| `_TZE204_jktmrpoj` | Gas Sensor | `gas_sensor` | DP1→alarm_gas, DP2→measure_battery | Check IAS zone |
| `_TZ3210_tgvtvdoc` | 4-Button Scene | `scene_switch_4` | DP1→press_type (0=single, 1=double, 2=hold) | Sleepy, 56-years bug risk |

---

## Priority Actions

### 🔴 High Priority (Known Issues)
1. **`_TZE200_nklqjk62`** — Motion sensor, likely has 56-years bug. Needs passive listener setup
2. **`_TZ3210_pagajpog`** — 4-button scene switch, sleepy device pattern
3. **`_TZE204_3q3maeoo`** — Smoke detector, check if IAS zone or Tuya DP

### 🟡 Medium Priority
4. **`_TZE200_a1ovdobn`** + **`_TZE284_a1ovdobn`** — TRV variants, check if same DP layout
5. **`_TZE284_432zhuwe`** — New TZE284 climate sensor, verify DP mapping
6. **`_TZE284_zm8zpwas`** — Presence radar, check if DP101 exists

### 🟢 Low Priority (Standard
